title: Crispy Ginger Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Japanese dish that combines the crunch of crispy vegetables with the warmth of ginger. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Japanese vegetables (such as carrots and bell peppers)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the Japanese vegetables and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the crispy ginger and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Pour in the soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sugar, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the green onions and sesame seeds.
Serve the stir fry hot over steamed rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional green onions and sesame seeds, if desired.
Cook time can be adjusted based on the tenderness of the vegetables.
